---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for PhysicsCopilot
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why did you rule them out?

## Component(s) affected

- [ ] Server (Go / API)
- [ ] Mobile app (Flutter)
- [ ] Knowledge base (KB / RAG)
- [ ] Web interface
- [ ] Infrastructure / deployment

## Additional context

Add mockups, links to related issues, or any other context here.
